name: Ulawulo Lokulimala Kobushushu
time_estimate: Iyaqhubeka de i-MEDEVAC okanye isigulane sizinzile
description: Ukulawulwa kweentlungu zokushisa, ukuphelelwa ubushushu, kunye nokubetha ubushushu. Ubushushu bubushushu bungxamisekileyo obubeka ubomi esichengeni -- ukupholisa ngokukhawuleza lunyango. Ukwahlula ukuphelelwa kobushushu (ukukhankanywa ngokuqhelekileyo) kwi-heat stroke (i-LOC etshintshiweyo) ngokukhawuleza.
equipment: Iyaqhubeka de i-MEDEVAC okanye isigulane sizinzile

Ukulawulwa kweentlungu zokushisa, ukuphelelwa ubushushu, kunye nokubetha ubushushu. Ubushushu bubushushu bungxamisekileyo obubeka ubomi esichengeni -- ukupholisa ngokukhawuleza lunyango. Ukwahlula ukuphelelwa kobushushu (ukukhankanywa ngokuqhelekileyo) kwi-heat stroke (i-LOC etshintshiweyo) ngokukhawuleza.
steps: Iipakethe zomkhenkce okanye amalaphu abandayo amanzi
UVAVANYO: Ngaba umntu owenzakeleyo uphaphile kwaye uzimisele? Ulusu olushushu olomileyo vs. ulusu olushushu olubilayo? Iqondo lokushisa eliphambili ukuba ithemometha ikhona.
IINGQIPHU ZOKUSHISA: Ukuqhawuka kwemisipha, ukucinga okuqhelekileyo. Ukuphumla emthunzini, i-rehydration yomlomo kunye ne-electrolytes, ukuzolula ngobumnene. Ayinabungozi.
warnings: UKUQHUBEKA OKUSHISAYO: Ukubila kakhulu, ubuthathaka, isiyezi, ingqondo eqhelekileyo okanye ekufutshane neqhelekileyo. Yiya kwindawo enomthunzi/epholileyo. Susa impahla engaphezulu. Ulwelo lomlomo (ukuba uyazi) okanye IV LR 1L phezu kwe-30-60 min. Jonga ukuqhubela phambili ukuya kwistrowuku sobushushu.

I-HEAT STROKE (ixesha likaxakeka): I-LOC etshintshileyo, ukubhideka, ukulwa, okanye ukungabi nazingqondweni. Ubushushu obungundoqo > 40C (104F). Ulusu olushushu (lunokuba lumanzi okanye lome). QALA: Susa ebushushwini ngoko nangoko, susa zonke iimpahla, ulusu olumanzi kunye nefeni ngokurhabaxa. Faka iipakethi ze-ice entanyeni, i-axillae, kunye ne-groin (iindawo eziphezulu ze-vascular). IV LR 1-2L. Khusela indlela yomoya ukuba akukho zingqondweni. MEDEVAC ngoko nangoko.
UNGAMniki i-aspirin okanye i-acetaminophen ngenxa yobushushu bestrowuku-- ayincedi, inokwenzakalisa.
Ukubeka iliso: okubalulekileyo q15 min, indlela yomoya, isimo sengqondo. Uxwebhu lwexesha lexesha.
follows: Qhubeka nokupholisa ngexesha le-MEDEVAC -- ungayeki ukuthutha.
precedes: Ubushushu bungumngcipheko obeka ubomi obungxamisekileyo -- ungaphosisi xa udinwa bubushushu. Jonga imeko yengqondo.

pediatric.note: Ukupholisa lolona nyango luchanekileyo. Musa ukulibazisa ukupholisa ukuseka ufikelelo lwe-IV.

obstetric.note: Ubushushu obunamandla bungenzeka kubantu abasempilweni -- ukomelela komzimba akukhuseli.

source: JTS CPG: Heat Stroke / PHTLS / US Army Hot Weather Training
